_comment: Demo add-on that triggers every deterministic violation check at once, except missing-library / obfuscated-code (need a bundled or minified file), api-coverage (needs a parse/resolution gap), and the outbound-data checks cleartext-transmission / privacy-policy / native-messaging (covered by the outbound-data fixture). It declares no icons key, so addon-icon-missing fires here too. The ESLint code-sanity check is opt-in, so this fixture enables it via options.eslint to keep it covered.
